user1.name: Ngoc Anh
user1.feedback: I significantly improved my pronunciation after a few weeks of practice. The listening-speaking exercises are very close to real-life communication.

user2.name: Minh Tuan
user2.feedback: Smart flashcards help me remember vocabulary longer. Studying 15-20 minutes a day but the results are clear.

user3.name: Thu Trang
user3.feedback: Easy-to-use interface, clear roadmap so I don't get discouraged. Motivated to study every day.

about.heroDescription: A smart English learning platform — helping you practice speaking, build vocabulary, and communicate confidently every day.

hero.title: About Us
hero.paragraph1: We are a team of passionate language experts and technology engineers with one shared goal: removing language barriers for Vietnamese learners.
hero.paragraph2: We focus on researching and applying modern education methods to create real impact for the community.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Help one million Vietnamese people communicate confidently in English through modern learning methods, practical practice, and supportive technology.

chapterOne.title: Our Story
chapterOne.paragraph1: The LingoSpeak founders started as passionate English learners who often felt stuck. Even with high exam scores, we still struggled to communicate with native speakers.
chapterOne.paragraph2: We realized the gap was the connection between “knowing” and “speaking”. That was when the idea of a platform focused on audio reflexes was formed.

chapterTwo.title: Vision & Development
chapterTwo.paragraph1: After months of research with language experts, we developed the “Audio Reflex Triangle”: listen deeply, write accurately, and speak confidently.
chapterTwo.paragraph2: It is not just about learning vocabulary, but about learning how the brain processes sound directly and instantly.

people.title: People First
people.description: Always put the learner experience first.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.description: Research and apply new technologies in education.

community.title: Community Impact
community.description: Bring English learning opportunities to more Vietnamese people.

cta.title: Ready to change?
cta.description: Do not let English be the barrier that keeps you from your biggest dreams. Start your confident English speaking journey today.

about.missionText: LingoSpeak is built to help English learners in Vietnam approach the language naturally and effectively — no pressure, no boredom, just 15-20 minutes a day.

topicLearning.title: Learn by Topic
topicLearning.desc: Choose topics that match your learning goals and daily communication.

about.learningPathSubtitle: Each topic on LingoSpeak follows a clear path, helping you learn vocabulary and practice speaking at the same time.

step1.title: Choose a Topic
step1.desc: Start with familiar everyday topics like family, travel, work...

step2.title: Learn Vocabulary
step2.desc: Memorize new words with flashcards, standard IPA pronunciation, and illustrative examples.

step3.title: Practice Conversation
step3.desc: Read and listen to sample conversations to understand how words are used in real context.

step4.title: Practice Speaking
step4.desc: Practice pronunciation, record and compare with native speakers to communicate confidently.
